hub_subtitle: Business English para Missões Internacionais e Pequenos Negócios

lesson.menu_desc: Talk about your objectives and plans with want to and would like to + verb -- 33 slides
lesson.subtitle: Lesson 9 -- Talking About Your Goals
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Flávia Florêncio Ferreira | Lesson 9 -- Talking About Your Goals
lesson.grammar_point: want to / would like to + verb (goals and plans)

listenings.text: Hi Flavia, it's Nina. I want to talk about your goals for this year. First, you want to improve your English for the international missions. That is a great goal, and I would like to help you. Next month, we want to visit two new countries, and you would like to present your project in English. I know you can achieve it. This is a big opportunity for your career. Let's talk soon!

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the Small Business Development Program. This year, we want to help you grow your company and improve your skills. Many consultants would like to work on international missions, and this program is a great opportunity. Today, three speakers want to share their goals with you. We would like to start at ten o'clock. This is your moment to succeed. Enjoy the program!

extra_audio.text: This year, I have five goals. First, I want to improve my English every week. Then, I would like to present my project in English at a fair. Next, I want to grow my network with new partners. After that, I would like to work on an international mission. Finally, I want to achieve success in my career.
